title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Ahmedabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd:
LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd!
